model_inventory.intended_use: AML analyst decision support for investigation drafting only
model_inventory.prohibited_use: No autonomous SAR filing, alert closure, customer contact, or client exit
model_inventory.limitations: Requires analyst approval and validated source evidence before disposition.

governance.data_quality: source freshness and completeness thresholds required
governance.drift: alert mix, override rate, false-positive rate, and guardrail-trip monitoring
governance.benchmark: historical analyst dispositions and rule-based baseline
governance.fairness: segment review by geography, customer type, PEP status, and risk band
governance.change_management: release_approval gates prompts, tools, datasets, thresholds
governance.vendor_risk: OpenAI model_provider and ADK/LiteLLM dependency risk tracked
governance.RBAC: builder, validator, approver, and analyst roles separated
governance.business_continuity: rollback, fail_closed, RTO, and RPO documented
